TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Siafulungay = Gaga mniq Taytung Taytungsu ka alang Siafulungay. 837 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 2,321 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 39% niqan 915 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 61% niqan 1,406 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis17%, Paiwan5%, Bunun2%, Puyuma11%, ni rahuq na o6%.
S.PHON: = sia*uluŋaj = gaga mniq tajtuŋ tajtuŋsu ka alaŋ sia*uluŋaj. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, paiwan*%, bunun*%, pujuma**%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Siafulungay = Gaga mniq Taytung Taytungsu ka alang Siafulungay. 837 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 2,321 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 39% niqan 915 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 61% niqan 1,406 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis17%, Paiwan5%, Bunun2%, Puyuma11%, ni rahuq na o6%.
S.PHON: = sia*uluŋaj = gaga mniq tajtuŋ tajtuŋsu ka alaŋ sia*uluŋaj. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, paiwan*%, bunun*%, pujuma**%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
